pros: No consistency rule — win big on Tuesdays
Full automation supported in eval AND funded
cons: EOD trailing DD (floor rises with profits)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: PHASE 1 (Day 1-3): 50% size. SESSION GOVERNOR only. Let trailing floor settle. Target $150/day. PHASE 2 (Day 4-7): 75% size. Prime sessions only (Tue + Golden Hour). PHASE 3 (Day 8+): Full size on prime sessions. STOP at $300 daily target HIT. Never chase. EOD ALARM at 3:54pm — FLATTEN EVERYTHING. Expected pass time: 8-12 trading days.

pros: STATIC DD — floor NEVER moves up (safest structure)
cons: No full automation in funded (signals OK)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: CONSISTENCY RULE MANAGEMENT: Total target $3,000. Max one day = $1,200 (40%). Spread across 5+ days. Strategy: $400-600/day × 6 days = $3,000 total. PERFECT for our system: multiple moderate wins beats one big win. Use PAIRS + XSMOM (high WR = consistent daily gains). Avoid TURTLE (too lumpy, might violate consistency). Expected pass time: 6-9 trading days.

Best firm for pure automation run — set live_firm.py prop=LUCID and let it go. Expected pass time: 5-8 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: NO CONSISTENCY RULE = our biggest edge here. Wait for a HIGH-IMPACT Tuesday + Golden Hour + HIGH ATR day. Go 1.8x size (stacked multiplier). One big day can pass the eval. Phase 1 (Day 1-4): Scout mode, 50% size, min losses. Day 5+: PRIME DAY only — full stacked size. Expected pass time: 5-10 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: HIGH PROFIT TARGET = need more prime sessions. Do NOT try to pass in one big day. Spread across 10+ days. Use the free reset generously — if first 3 days go wrong, reset immediately. Strategy: $250/day × 5 days = $1,250 (less than target). Need $750+ on remaining days. Save Tuesday for the push. Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: STATIC-LIKE DD = low risk of accidental bust. Take full 10+ days at measured pace. $300/day average = pass in 10 days. No EOD flat = can hold TURTLE trend positions overnight. Use TURTLE agent here — longer holds are OK. Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days.

firm_notes.noble_strategy: LOW TARGETS = quickest pass if careful. $300/day on 50K is easy on a Tuesday prime session. BUT tight $500 daily loss = must be very precise. Use only 1 MNQ to stay within risk. Expected pass time: 5-7 trading days (fastest possible).

fortress_at_target.warning: EOD TRAILING: Use recommended amount only. Run again before each payout.

cons: Floor moves with every new intraday high
Open position P&L affects trailing floor in real time
Easy to violate unknowingly on volatile NQ days
firm_notes.noble_strategy: INTRADAY TRAILING = different rules. Open P&L counts toward trailing floor in real time. Strategy: 1 MNQ ONLY. Take profit immediately at +$50 per trade. Never let a winner give back more than 50%. Session Governor is MORE critical here — only trade HIGH ATR + Tuesday. NEVER hold through macro events (open P&L spike → lower floor). Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days (slower but safer). HONEST NOTE: Consider APEX instead — same cost, much safer structure.
